paper.title: L’infrastructure du lien social : un déterminant territorial du vote pour le Rassemblement National (1995-2022) sous la direction d’Hugo Subtil (student project)
paper.authors: Yann Crapsky, Yann Mear, Sacha Ratsavong, Tristan Touchard
paper.takeaway: The loss of third places is driving up the National Rally’s share of the vote in rural French municipalities
paper.description: The study defines treatment for rural French municipalities as the year when the number of third places falls below 60% of its 1998 level. Treatment is binary, staggered over time, and permanent once it begins. The analysis estimates the effect of treatment 1–5 elections later on the National Rally (RN) vote share in the first round of presidential elections (2002–2022). The results shown refer only to non-suburban rural municipalities.

methodology.code:
modele_did = DidMultiplegtDyn(
df=df_pres_polars,
outcome='vote_RN_pres', 
group='codecommune', 
time='Annee', 
treatment='traitée', 
placebo=2, 
effects=5, 
cluster='codecommune', 
controls = ['pop', 'propf', 'prop014', 'prop1539', 'prop60p', 'petranger', 'pouem', 'pchom', 'paind','pbac', 'psup', 'revmoy']
) 
modele_did.fit() 
modele_did.summary() 
modele_did.plot()
